creator: Patrick.Powell@astart.com
text:
LPRng port updated for FreeBSD 7.x/8-Current as of 18 Mar 2009
  - configuration generated using autoconf 2.61 
  - added 64 bit file types where indicated.

LPRng distribution now LPRng-3.8.33.tgz
ftp.lprng.com update

  Patrick Powell, LPRng maintainer

Fix: LPRng port DIFF (diff -ru LPRng LPRng.orig)
